name: disaster_response_staffing_model_assigns_mesa_tru_loy
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Disaster Response, the situation tagged internally around disaster response staffing model assigns mesa tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Talia Chen
agents.identity: I am Talia Chen, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Disaster Response. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Nowak
agents.identity: I am Keisha Nowak, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Disaster Response. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Talia Chen must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Talia Chen do?
